Unleash the rage, confront the past. With the fate of humans and mutants hanging in the balance, Logan knows the world needs a hero; however, they’ll have to settle for Wolverine.

Experience thrilling set pieces throughout Wolverine’s journey in this global fight for mutant survival.

Marvel’s Wolverine arrives on PlayStation 5 consoles September 15, 2026. Pre-order now.

trending_videos.title: NHL 27 Official Reveal Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Every team has an edge in NHL 27. Pre-order* NHL 27 to play 7 Days Early on September 4th!  
https://x.ea.com/90123

EA SPORTS™ NHL® 27 brings every NHL team's identity to life on the ice, in the arena, and through the broadcast.

Experience Authentic Atmospheres across all 32 NHL arenas with real-world goal songs, new broadcast package and updated crowds.

A refreshed broadcast package featuring John Buccigross and Darren Pang delivers new commentary, modern graphics, updated visuals, and richer storytelling for a more authentic NHL presentation.

Connected Franchise lets you create and run your own online league with up to 32 human-controlled teams, complete with customizable rules, flexible scheduling, roster management, and powerful commissioner tools.

On the ice, 32 unique Team Playbooks powered by NHL EDGE data bring authentic team identities to life. From breakouts to special teams and late-game strategy, every matchup feels more distinct, making every shift matter.

Conditions

trending_videos.title: The Batman Part 2 - Official 'Camera Test' Teaser Trailer (2028) Robert Pattinson
trending_videos.description:
Don't miss the 'Camera Test' Teaser Trailer for The Batman Part 2, the crime action superhero drama distributed by Warner Bros. Get a brief look at the caped crusader in frame and ready for the next installment in his story as The Batman. The Batman Part 2 is in theaters on February 18, 2028.

The Batman Part 2 stars Robert Pattinson, Scarlett Johansson, Sebastian Stan, Colin Farrell, Andy Serkis, Jeffrey Wright, Barry Keoghan, Brian Tyree Henry, and more. The film is directed by Matt Reeves and written by Bill Finger, Bob Kane, and Matt Reeves.

The Batman Part 2 is in theaters on February 18, 2028.

#TheBatmanPart2 #Movies #IGN
